response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, and his work on scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure aligns with the role’s needs; however, his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles for over a decade) vastly exceeds the junior/mid-level expectation, and his lack of explicit PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS service experience raises concerns about role fit and potential overqualification.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI/agent tooling at re:cinq
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of software architecture
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior/staff experience, may be misaligned with junior role
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services (RDS, S3, etc.)
German language proficiency is only basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
